name: alex-pipedream
description: Pipedream-hosted Integration Layer for Alex. Inbound CRM/calendar/email/recording webhooks normalize to IntegrationEvent and forward to the Agent Runtime.

scripts.lint: node --check src/lib/integration_event.mjs src/lib/normalizer.mjs src/lib/forwarder.mjs src/lib/errors.mjs src/lib/activity_log.mjs src/lib/action_request.mjs src/lib/verifier.mjs src/lib/executors.mjs src/lib/dry_run.mjs
